ksa_text: Establish and operate continuous monitoring programs for deployed AI systems to track operational performance, detect degradation and behavioral drift.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-007 (Risk Management/Task) scores 0.432 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.432). Scope is edge_case for Algorithmic Trading Engineer: 1 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Risk Management, composite 0.432. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk Management for Algorithmic Trading Engineer at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management appears in ~45% of Algorithmic Trading Engineer postings as a secondary competency. Risk modeling (VaR, drawdown, stress) appears in senior ATE profiles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Risk Management with role-relevant signals (1) is market-supported. Final decision: include.
